args.title: Countdown Timer
args.css: .root { background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(20, 20, 30, 0.98), rgba(40, 20, 60, 0.98)); color: #ffffff; padding: 32px; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(100, 70, 200, 0.3); box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.7); height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, sans-serif; animation: fadeIn 0.4s ease-out; } @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-10px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } .header { font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 12px; text-align: center; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #8b5cf6, #ec4899); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; } .sub { font-size: 14px; color: #a78bfa; margin-bottom: 48px; text-align: center; opacity: 0.9; } .timer-display { flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 88px; font-weight: 700; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; letter-spacing: -2px; color: #ffffff; text-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.6), 0 0 80px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3); margin: 24px 0; } .input-section { margin-bottom: 32px; } .label { display: block; font-size: 12px; color: #a78bfa; margin-bottom: 8px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; font-weight: 600; } .input { width: 100%; padding: 14px; background: rgba(30, 30, 50, 0.6); border: 1px solid rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3); border-radius: 8px; color: white; font-size: 16px; transition: all 0.3s; } .input:focus { border-color: #8b5cf6; outline: none; background: rgba(30, 30, 50, 0.8); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.1); } .input::placeholder { color: rgba(167, 139, 250, 0.4); } .actions { display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-top: auto; } .btn { flex: 1; padding: 16px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; transition: all 0.2s; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; } .btn-start { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8b5cf6, #7c3aed); color: white; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.4); } .btn-start:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.6); } .btn-pause { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f59e0b, #d97706); color: white; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.4); } .btn-pause:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.6); } .btn-reset { background: rgba(55, 65, 81, 0.6); color: white; border: 1px solid rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.2); } .btn-reset:hover { background: rgba(75, 85, 101, 0.8); transform: translateY(-2px); } .btn-close { background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.2); color: #fca5a5; border: 1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.3); } .btn-close:hover { background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.3); border-color: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.5); }

children.children: Set your timer and start the countdown
